title: (MTR4) Hampton Railways Train Pack
description: A fictional train pack. Retextures of default trains from Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This pack is one that I've been working on for months now. This is another train pack for Minecraft Transit Railway. As of now, there is one train that I've completed, and will add more in due time. The liveries you see are inspired by my local transit operator, Hampton Roads Transit. 


Trains currently in this pack: 
Hampton Railways M12 Mini, Small, and Normal (Re-textured MTR M-Train) 

There are more trains to come, but there are so many that they will be separated into different packs, as follows: 

1. Hampton Railways (this one) 
2. Hampton Underground 
3. Hampton Trams 
4. Hampton Subway
5. Hampton Light Rail

I do NOT claim any affiliation with Hampton Roads Transit, directly or indirectly through this pack.
